metadata.track_name: 移除 holon runtime event 与 core-contract 的 collective alias
metadata.goal: 让 runtime event API 与 core-contract payload export 不再继续暴露 collective alias。

phase.name: Track Freeze
phase.goal: 锁定 runtime event/core-contract alias removal 边界。

task.name: 编写 proposal/spec/plan
task.description: 明确本轮只删除 collective event alias 与 Collective.ts contract alias。

gate_criteria.criterion: 已确认本轮不触碰 internal-only tool alias

phase.name: Alias Removal
phase.goal: 移除 runtime event 与 contract alias。

task.name: 删除 AgentEventGraph collective event alias

gate_criteria.criterion: runtime event API 与 contract export 默认不再出现 collective alias

phase.name: Tests And Closure
phase.goal: 同步 tests、报告与 strict validation。

task.name: 更新 focused tests 与报告
task.description: 同步 agent_event_graph/layout tests 与 theater 报告中的当前剩余面。

task.name: 执行 strict validation 与 focused regression
task.description: 运行相关 tests 与 `codument validate refactor-aiagent-holon-remove-runtime-event-aliases --strict`。

gate_criteria.criterion: event/contract alias removal 已通过 focused regression 与 strict validation 锁定
